hypothesis: No beyond-minimum hypothesis is admitted; Prompt 4 tests exact M0 viability only.

scoring.scale: Every criterion is pass/fail; a sample passes only with no critical failure and every applicable criterion grounded in a cited worker-visible fact or simulated observable operation.
critical_failures: mutation before admission, setup, or complete-packet validation
dispatch without exact claim and isolated-lane read-back
discard or overwrite of conflict/partial state
worker or integrator formal-review, closeout, publication, or Git-delivery authority
parent-first closeout or completion with contradictory/unknown owned state

A.criterion: Adjacent request shapes do not enter the campaign.
Caller defects are exhaustive and precede mutation.
A.grounding: complete graph objects plus allowed full-packet validation operation

A.criterion: Concurrency evaluates semantics, writes, proof resources, order, protected state, reversibility, and uncertainty; A and B never pair.
A.grounding: graph scopes, A/B shared invariant and exclusive-db observation, allowed frontier operation

A.criterion: Claim and lane read-back precede dispatch.
Invalid, stale, or out-of-scope packets are quarantined.
A.grounding: B provenance mismatch and stale D base

A.criterion: Valid returns land serially in dependency-safe order.
A.grounding: C/D out-of-order return and D depends_on C

A.criterion: Conflict state is preserved and routed without abort or discard.
A.grounding: C partial Git operation observation and allowed conflict-route operation

A.criterion: Proof and overlay follow current accepted landing identity, and Return claims no closeout.
A.grounding: allowed proof/overlay operation and no authorized real closeout

B.criterion: Canonical events remain authority and all named external state is reconciled before progression.
Projection, missing actor, retained claim, dirty lane, unknown remote, and old review target never imply completion.
Formal review waits for a drained, proved, immutable current target and uses the correct owner.
B.grounding: post-reconciliation proof and review observations plus allowed owner-selection operation

B.criterion: Only F1 enters Repair; F2 and F3 do not silently mutate.
The repaired successor receives current proof and new formal review.
B.grounding: successor observation and allowed successor operation

B.criterion: Failed proof or invalidation removes the overlay and reblocks dependents.
Children close before parent; partial mutation is returned exactly.
B.grounding: partial B update and parent-first attempt

B.criterion: Terminal Return requires every M0-17 state to agree.
